info.name: multi-tenant local API test
info.description: Local API collection for gateway, Auth/IAM, tenant-service internal APIs, and Admin BFF. External business/admin requests should use gateway -> BFF routes. Tenant-service direct requests are internal caller simulations for local debugging only. Run `pnpm db:reset:local` before using the seeded demo account. Seed tenant code follows the tenant-service generation rule and defaults to `DEMO0001` for `demo.localhost`.
